languages.text:
The target creature adjacent to Solomorne makes AGI Save -{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b}.
On a failure, the creature becomes {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}Immobilized{/g} and is considered full cover for Solomorne.
Successful use of this ability ends the turn!

languages.text:
The target creature adjacent to Solomorne must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b} penalty.
On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, the creature becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} and is considered {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}full cover{/g} for Solomorne. Then, Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} ends.
If the target creature passes the test, there is no effect, and Solomorne's turn does not end.

languages.text:
Существо на соседней с Соломоном клетке должно пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b}.
При провале {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверки{/g} существо оказывается {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвижено{/g} и считается {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}полным укрытием{/g} для Соломона. После этого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} Соломона заканчивается.
При успехе эффект не срабатывает, и ход Соломона не заканчивается.

Существо на соседней с Соломоном клетке должно пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b}.

languages.text:
La créature adjacente à Solomorne ciblée doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} avec une pénalité de −{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b}.
En cas d'échec, elle est {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilisée{/g} et considérée comme une {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}couverture totale{/g} pour Solomorne,{g|Encyclopedia:Test}{/g} dont le {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} prend fin.
En cas de réussite, il n'y a pas d'effet et le tour de Solomorne continue.

languages.text:
Solomorne'un bitişiğindeki hedef yaratık, −{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b} ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir.
Yaratık, bu {g|Encyclopedia:Test}testte{/g} başarısız olursa {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}felç{/g} olur ve Solomorne için {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}tam siper{/g} kabul edilir. Ardından Solomorne'un {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} sonlanır.
Hedef yaratık, testi geçerse hiçbir etki olmaz ve Solomorne'un turu da sonlanmaz.

languages.text:
与索罗蒙相邻的目标生物必须通过1项有{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b}减值的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}。
{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}失败则该生物陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}定身{/g}状态，并视为索罗蒙的{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}全身掩体{/g}，随后索罗蒙{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束。
若目标生物通过检定，则无效果，索罗蒙回合继续。

languages.text:
La criatura objetivo adyacente a Solomorne debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g} con una penalización de −{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b}.
Si falla esta {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g}, la criatura queda {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}inmovilizada{/g} y se considera {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cobertura total{/g} para Solomorne. Después termina el {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} de Solomorne.
Si la criatura objetivo supera la prueba, no se produce ningún efecto y el turno de Solomorne no termina.

Si la criatura objetivo supera la prueba, no se produce ningún efecto y el turno de Solomorne no termina.

languages.text:
Die anvisierte Kreatur neben Solomorne muss eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} mit einem Abzug von −{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b} bestehen.
Misslingt die {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Probe{/g}, wird die Kreatur mit {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}Gelähmt{/g} belegt und ist dadurch für Solomorne in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}voller Deckung{/g}. Danach endet Solomornes {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g}.
Besteht die anvisierte Kreatur den Test, gibt es keinen Effekt und Solomornes Zug endet nicht.

languages.text:
ソロモーンに隣接する対象クリーチャーは、−{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b}のペナルティを伴う{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗判定{/g}を行わなければならない。
{g|Encyclopedia:Test}判定{/g}に失敗すると、そのクリーチャーは{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}移動不能{/g}になり、ソロモーンにとって{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}完全遮蔽{/g}とみなされる。その後、ソロモーンの{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}が終了する。
対象クリーチャーが判定に成功した場合、効果はなく、ソロモーンのターンは終了しない。
